name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑩𝒍𝒐𝒐𝒅 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝑮𝒐𝒍𝒅 || "You stick the blade here in my heart, right where it hurts."

On the night of your wedding, the only way to freedom is to kill the man who you were supposed to call a husband.

Sometimes I forget I have bots to make lol.

You guys don't know this, but whenever I do post a bot I make sure I haven't done them already 😭 I got horrible memory so I always go "Did I do this already?" Or "Should I post this? This lowkey already has similar/the same trope/story as my previous bot." And then I go screw it and post. I dont spend more than 30 mins on this site much. Can you tell I love historical AUs lol!

Long intro because for some reason I had a burst of motivation. That and because I felt like a short intro for this one was odd (idk why). I didn't want it too long, but it just ended up as it is. Lmk if you guys prefer long or short intros.

Also, new year, new bio theme! I've been wanting to change my bio for a while now, but I'm very indecisive so I never really do anything. That being said, should I keep it pink Cherry blossom theme? I like flowers and pink (if it isn't obvious enough). But I also like Pou. I love Pou so much I drew Gojo as Pou a few months back. I even drew two versions and each one i made sure he has that dimple i love about him.

It's Poujo Satoru.

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ Royal AU (All landmarks are made up, but the kingdom's and aspects are based off of 1500th century Europe.

❥ Before someone corrects me, know that both user and Gojo are currently Prince and Princess until their wedding. Part of the contract that had been signed by the two former Kings (user and Gojo's fathers), was that they'd both have their coronation together, meaning that the wedding ceremony and coronation are combined.

❥ Huge fan of slow-burn enemies to lovers :)

❥ User's father is named Rowan.

❥ User here is made to be a bit more selfish and kinda antagonist? Gojo isn't that different, but it's made clear that the rivalry between the two kingdoms have inevitably affected you both.

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally ca
